zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Brent於1479年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可希頓時，她的父親Robert Brent35歲，母親Margaret Malet40歲。她和Giles Haile Hill至少有16個兒子和15個女兒。她去世於1536年在英國薩默塞特也奧維爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Brent于1479年1月1日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特可希頓时，她的父亲Robert Brent35岁，母亲Margaret Malet40岁。她和Giles Haile Hill至少有16个儿子和15个女儿。她去世于1536年在英国薩默塞特也奧維爾享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

nameMeanings.name: Brent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from East Brent in Somerset or South Brent in Devon, both named from Old English brente ‘steep place’, referring to the steep hills on which they stand. Compare Brents .
History: Giles Brent came from Gloucestershire, England, to MD in 1638.

variants.name: Brunt
meanings: English (Midlands and Wales): habitational name from Brund in Staffordshire or from some other place called from a burnt clearing (Middle English brend ‘burned’). In placenames Brund- and Brunt- are to some extent interchangeable with Brent .
English: nickname from Middle English brund, brunt, brond, metathesized forms of burned, burnt ‘burnt’, perhaps with reference to branding as a punishment for a crime. Compare Brent .

variants.name: Brents
meanings: Altered form of English Brent , with the addition of excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Brent was born on 1 January 1479, in Cossington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Brent, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Malet, was 40. She had at least 16 sons and 15 daughters with Giles Haile Hill. She died in 1536, in Yeovil, Somerset, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Brent est née le 1 janvier 1479, à Cossington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Brent, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Malet, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 16 fils et 15 filles avec Giles Haile Hill. Elle est décédée en 1536, à Yeovil, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lyme Regis, Dorset, England: Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Brent am 1. Januar 1479 in Cossington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Brent 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Malet 40. Sie hatte mit Giles Haile Hill mindestens 16 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Sie starb 1536 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Yeovil, Somerset, England und wurde in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Brent è nata il il 1 gennaio 1479 nel Cossington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Brent, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Malet, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 16 figli e 15 figlie con Giles Haile Hill. Morì nel 1536, nel Yeovil, Somerset, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Brentが1479年1月1日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトコシントンで生まれた時，父Robert Brentは35歳，母Margaret Maletは40歳であった。彼女はGiles Haile Hillとの間に少なくとも16人の息子と15人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1536年にイギリスソメルセトイエオヴィルで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Brent(이)가 1479년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Brent(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Malet(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Giles Haile Hill(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 영국 서머세트 예오빌에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 16 filhos e 15 filhas com Giles Haile Hill. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Brent родилась 1 января 1479 г. в местности коссингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Brent было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Malet, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 16 сыновей и 15 дочерей от Giles Haile Hill. Она умерла в 1536 г. в местности иеовил, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 16 hijos y 15 hijas con Giles Haile Hill.
